details.test: Task 1: Order cheapest medium bamboo cutting board under $60 with family name engraving
Task 2: Configure 4 stainless steel tumblers with cheapest shipping under 10 business days
Task 3: Choose higher-rated engraved phone stand in walnut or maple under $40 and add to cart
Task 4: Request bulk quote for 50 items with $300 budget and 30-day timeline
Task 5: Save customized rustic wedding welcome sign (12 x 18 in) to wishlist
Task 6: Find anniversary gift under $40 with 4+ stars and free gift wrapping, then add to cart
Task 7: Order 3 engraved pens for same-day store pickup with different names
Task 8: Schedule video-call design consultation for large custom wall art
